name: components/carousel
description: A scrollable content slider that cycles through a set of items horizontally or vertically, with optional navigation arrows, dot indicators, and autoplay. Provides a complete composition system with Carousel, CarouselContent, CarouselItem, CarouselPrevious, CarouselNext, and CarouselDots. Supports touch swipe, keyboard arrow navigation, responsive item counts, and loop modes.
useCases: Hero banners on marketing landing pages rotating through feature highlights and CTAs
Product-image galleries in e-commerce detail pages with thumbnail navigation
Testimonial or review sliders showing customer quotes one at a time
Card-based recommendation carousels for related articles, products, or videos
usage: import { Carousel, CarouselContent, CarouselItem, CarouselPrevious, CarouselNext, CarouselDots } from "shadcn-solid-components/components/carousel"
